sections.paragraph:
Original: בּחל

Transliteration: bâchal

Phonetic: baw-khal'

BDB Definition:

  1. to loathe, abhor, feel loathing
    1. (Qal)
      1. to loathe
      2. to gain by greed, gain hastily
    2. (Pual) obtained by greed

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 229

Part(s) of speech: Verb
